pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation: https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation-for-android-2-0/2/en/topic/route-amp-navigation confirms three route computation options including 'Shortest'

Pattern validation: 'route' is an appropriate search pattern for route-related settings. Official docs confirm setting location is 'Menu → Settings → Route & Navigation' which contains the term 'route'

Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation confirms: (1) 'Shortest' is one of three route computing options, (2) 'Route' appears in menu path 'Route & Navigation', (3) 'Computing' appears in 'Route computing' terminology. All keywords verified in official Sygic sources.
Google Play Store official app page confirms package ID: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.sygic.aura
Official app page on Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.sygic.aura
Multiple official Sygic sources confirm three route computation algorithms: Fastest (least time), Shortest (shortest distance), Economic (lowest fuel consumption)

privileged_info_summary: The task targets Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura), a real Android navigation application. The app provides three route computation options in Menu → Settings → Route & Navigation: Fastest, Shortest, and Economic. The target setting 'Shortest' is a verified option in the app's route settings. The keywords 'shortest', 'route', and 'computing' are all standard terminology found in the app's UI and official documentation. The APK file is a legitimate copy of the official app (152 MB). The task requires navigating the app's settings menu and changing the route computation method from the default 'Fastest' to 'Shortest'.
